title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 311.557 - License, revocation
text:
311.557.  License, revocation. — After notice and opportunity for a hearing, the supervisor may revoke or suspend the license of any manufacturer, out-state solicitor or wholesale dealer who fails to comply with the provisions of sections 311.553 and 311.555.  No new or renewal license shall be granted to a person who fails to comply with sections 311.553 and 311.555.
(L. 1961 p. 43 § 311.553)
